# Obsidian Callouts

> [!NOTE]
> This is a basic note callout.

> [!WARNING] Custom Warning Title
> This warning has a custom title.
> And it has multiple lines.
> 
> And multiple paragraphs.

> [!TIP]+
> This is a foldable callout that defaults to open. In PDF it will just be rendered normally.

> [!DANGER]-
> This is a foldable callout that defaults to closed. In PDF it will be rendered normally (expanded).

> [!INFO]
> Info callout

> [!SUCCESS]
> Success callout

> [!QUESTION]
> Question callout

> [!FAILURE]
> Failure callout

> [!EXAMPLE]
> Example callout

> [!QUOTE]
> Quote callout
